name: QR Code Generator API
description: Generate QR codes in PNG, SVG, or Base64 format with customizable size, colors, and error correction levels. Fast, reliable, and easy to integrate.
long_description:
## Overview

Free QR Code Generator API built on Cloudflare Workers for ultra-low latency worldwide. Generate QR codes from any text or URL in PNG, SVG, or Base64 format with full customization of size, colors, and error correction levels.

## Key Features

- ✅ Multiple output formats: PNG, SVG, and Base64
- ✅ Customizable foreground and background colors (hex)
- ✅ Adjustable error correction levels (L/M/Q/H)
- ✅ Configurable image size from 10px to 1000px
- ✅ Ultra-fast response via Cloudflare edge network (<50ms)

## Use Cases

- **E-commerce**: Generate QR codes for product pages, payments, and receipts
- **Marketing**: Create QR codes for flyers, business cards, and posters
- **Event Management**: Generate ticket QR codes and check-in systems
- **Mobile Apps**: Deep-link QR codes for app downloads and promotions
- **Inventory**: Asset tagging and tracking with scannable QR codes

## Quick Start

```
GET /generate?text=https://example.com&size=300&format=png
```

Returns a PNG image of the QR code. Add `&color=FF0000&bgcolor=FFFFFF` for custom colors.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 5,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier includes PNG output, default colors, and sizes up to 500px. No credit card required.
